description: MrScraper is a cloud-based web scraping platform that allows users to extract structured data from websites without coding. It provides visual point-and-click interface, scheduling, and data export options.
authentication: OAuth 2.0 and API key based authentication
self_serve: Yes, users can sign up, create projects, and manage scrapers through the web dashboard
api_surface: RESTful API for creating, updating, and running scrapers, retrieving results, and managing projects
mcp: No public information on multi‑cloud provider support
buildability: Users can build scrapers via visual editor; no SDKs available for custom code integration
main_blocker: Limited to websites that do not employ advanced anti‑scraping measures; no support for JavaScript heavy sites without headless browser option
